copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Chat History Filtering by Copilot Experience
copilot.summary:
Users will now see chat history scoped to their current Copilot Chat endpoint, with the option to see ‘All chats’ view.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Work IQ APIs: Researcher Agent Access
copilot.summary:
Allows developers to invoke the Researcher agent through the Work IQ endpoint to perform multi‑step analysis, deep reasoning, and synthesis across enterprise content as part of agentic workflows.
GA date: July CY2026
Preview date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Get actionable suggestions from Copilot in your Copilot Page
copilot.summary:
Request feedback from Copilot on your Page by selecting "Suggested edits" in the Copilot Shortcuts menu. Copilot will analyze the content on your page and provide actionable suggestions about what you can change to improve clarity and quality of your written content. You can then apply suggestions directly to the page.
GA date: June CY2026
Preview date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot People Connectors introduces people data ingestions with differentiated access control
copilot.summary:
Copilot People Connector now supports importing people data with access controls into Microsoft 365. This release enables organizations to bring people data from external systems into Microsoft 365 along with associated access control lists (ACLs), ensuring Copilot respects existing permissions defined in source systems. The imported data can be scoped to specific individuals and groups, allowing Copilot to reason over people data while honoring access restrictions.
GA date: August CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot Studio: Use MCP-compliant tools in agent workflows
copilot.summary:
Integrate proprietary systems, dynamic knowledge sources, and custom actions into your agentic workflows with MCP support, accelerating extensibility while preserving workflow reliability. This integration improves reuse across agents and workflows, reduces duplication of integrations, and embraces an emerging open and extensible agent ecosystem.
GA date: June CY2026
Preview date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot Studio: Supercharge your workflows with computer use
copilot.summary:
Add resilient, AI-powered UI automation directly into your workflows with computer use tools. Makers can build reusable, goal-oriented automations that adapt dynamically to website or app changes, while admins maintain governance through access controls, hosted browser management, and environment-level permissions.
GA date: October CY2026
Preview date: April CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Agent metrics for custom reporting in Insights analyst workbench
copilot.summary:
Unlock deeper insights into Copilot agent adoption with flexible, self-serve analytics. Insights global and partition analysts can access and combine granular agent usage metrics with agent and organizational attributes to uncover agent adoption trends, export and customize reporting, and drive more informed decisions, without relying on predefined dashboards.
GA date: September CY2026
Preview date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot Studio: Invoke agents as workflow steps with the agent node
copilot.summary:
Add an agent node to your workflow to reason over data, call tools, and return a response, all within a single step. The agent node lets you embed reasoning directly into your workflow. This means fewer manual handoffs, faster processing times, and workflows that can handle nuanced decisions without additional development effort, helping teams automate more of their end-to-end processes and reduce operational overhead.
GA date: September CY2026
Preview date: April CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Dynamic Tool Discovery for Declarative Agents and Federated Copilot Connectors
copilot.summary:
We're introducing dynamic tool discovery for declarative agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot. Developers can now add, update, or retire tools on their MCP servers without republishing the agent - so end users get the latest agent capabilities immediately, with no deployment cycle in between. Support for federated Copilot connectors will be a fast follow to declarative agents at a later stage. Dynamic tool discovery is backed by Microsoft's enterprise RAI and security protections, and customers retain full control over agent deployment and availability to users and groups.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot in PowerPoint for Government clouds
copilot.summary: Copilot in PowerPoint lets you create, edit, and refine presentations through natural conversation, directly in your presentation. You can start a new presentation or build on an existing one, asking Copilot to generate slides, update content, improve layouts, and polish design—while preserving formatting, structure, and branding. Copilot uses your files, meetings, emails, and more to help shape content and iterate quickly, and it connects to your brand kit so you can apply branded templates, insert brand approved images, and check for brand compliance. Available to Microsoft 365 Copilot–licen

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Fresh Copilot Metrics in Custom Person Queries & Reports- Viva Advanced Analysis
copilot.summary:
Key Microsoft 365 Copilot metrics in custom person queries and reports will have values up to 2-3 days old from the current date. This will provide fresher copilot usage analysis to analysts in Viva Advanced analysis.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): SharePoint list support in Agent Builder
copilot.summary:
Agent Builder now supports using a SharePoint list as a knowledge source for agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot. Makers can ground an agent in structured list data so users can ask questions and get responses based on information stored in a selected SharePoint list. For this release, each agent can reference one SharePoint list with up to 20,000 items, alongside other knowledge source types. Support for list attachments and lookup columns is not yet available.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention to restrict processing external emails in Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat
copilot.summary:
We are expanding Microsoft Purview DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat to safeguard risks from external emails. This real-time control helps organizations mitigate data risks by preventing Microsoft 365 Copilot and Chat from processing emails from senders external to your organization. This capability currently extends to Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents built in Copilot Studio that are published to Microsoft 365 Copilot.
GA date: July CY2026
Preview date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention for Microsoft 365 Copilot to safeguard prompts for government clouds
copilot.summary:
We are expanding Microsoft Purview DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot to safeguard prompts containing sensitive data. This real-time control helps organizations mitigate data leakage and oversharing risks by preventing Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents from returning a response when prompts contain sensitive data or using that sensitive data for grounding in Microsoft 365 or the web. This capability currently extends to Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents built in Copilot Studio that are published to Microsoft 365 Copilot. 
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Vision in Microsoft 365 Copilot can analyze content shared on-screen
copilot.summary:
Vision in Microsoft 365 Copilot helps you make faster, more informed decisions by understanding context from what you share on your screen. Copilot can analyze visual inputs from shared desktop screens and provide detailed insights about the content. Talk to Copilot for answers grounded in work and web data.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics: Copilot usage snapshot PBI at day level with fresh data
copilot.summary:
A day level Copilot adoption Power BI report reflecting the most recent copilot activity & freshest insights.
GA date: November CY2026
Preview date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview: eDiscovery – Enhancement of Loop and Copilot Pages in Review and Export
copilot.summary:
Improves eDiscovery workflows for Loop and Copilot pages by enabling full indexing of page content for keyword search within review sets and adding HTML format support for export from search.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Outlook: Copilot Settings in classic Outlook for Windows
copilot.summary:
You will now be able to access different Copilot settings directly in classic Outlook for Windows.
GA date: July CY2026
Preview date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Lifecycle Management – Insights and policy recommendations on Microsoft Copilot and AI Apps interactions for better Data Security and Compliance posture
copilot.summary:
Provide insights on Copilots and AI Apps usage and recommend retention policies for customers to govern their Copilots and AI App interactions.
GA date: August CY2026
Preview date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot in Forms - US Government clouds
copilot.summary:
Copilot in Forms is being enabled for Microsoft Forms in Government Cloud environments, bringing end-to-end AI assistance to forms, from creating a form, to refining and sending to analyzing results. This rollout includes key Copilot features such as: - Draft with Copilot - Distribution and monitoring - Copilot Insights - On-canvas Copilot features such as Rewrite question, Continue writing, Answer explanations, and more.
GA date: September CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Work IQ APIs – Unified REST Endpoint for Agents and Workflows
copilot.summary:
Introduces a new REST endpoint for Work IQ that serves as a unified entry point for invoking agents and workflows, providing a consistent, scalable alternative to legacy Copilot Chat endpoints.
GA date: June CY2026
Preview date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Work IQ APIs – Remote MCP Server Support
copilot.summary:
Supports connecting to remote MCP servers through the Work IQ endpoint, enabling agents to securely invoke external tools and services beyond the local runtime for richer, distributed agent orchestration.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Work IQ APIs - Endpoints: Declarative Agent Access
copilot.summary:
Enables programmatic access to first‑party and tenant‑defined declarative agents via the Work IQ endpoint, allowing applications to trigger specialized agents for domain‑specific tasks within broader workflows.
GA date: June CY2026
Preview date: April CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Simplified design for the Microsoft 365 Copilot app
copilot.summary:
A refreshed design for the Microsoft 365 Copilot web and desktop app simplifies the user experience to drive engagement with Copilot. This includes updates to the chat home screen, chat response layout, and navigation pane.
GA date: June CY2026
Preview date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Teams Meetings in Copilot Notebooks
copilot.summary:
Meetings as References in Copilot Notebooks bring Teams meeting content into the notebook experience, enabling users to ground Copilot on the discussions, decisions, and context that drive their work. By adding meetings as knowledge sources, users can connect transcripts, notes, chats, and shared content directly to their projects, enriching notebooks beyond files alone and improving downstream outputs like presentations and briefs. 

Available in Copilot Notebooks across Microsoft 365.
GA date: June CY2026
Preview date: April CY2026

copilot.title: SharePoint: Authoritative Sites
copilot.summary:
Authoritative Sites feature empowers administrators to designate specific SharePoint sites as official, trusted sources of information. By classifying these sites as authoritative these high-quality, credible content, such as company news, policies, and updates, are prioritized across Copilot Chat and Copilot Search experiences
GA date: June CY2026
Preview date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Generate documents using forms in SharePoint with Power Automate
copilot.summary:
We are introducing a new Power Automate action that enables automated document generation using document generation (DocGen) forms in SharePoint. 
Generate document from form (Preview) allows customers to create documents from a template by mapping data inputs to predefined template fields.
Documents are generated as part of an automated flow and stored in SharePoint.
This capability supports scenarios such as creating contracts, invoices, letters, or reports using structured templates and form-driven inputs.
The action works by mapping input data to template fields and returns the generat

copilot.title: Microsoft Edge: Unifying Copilot Chat policy controls
copilot.summary:
The Microsoft365CopilotChatIconEnabled policy is becoming the standard for configuring Copilot Chat. Extension and sidebar policies will no longer affect the appearance or functionality of Copilot Chat.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Additional meeting results in Copilot responses
copilot.summary:
Today, Copilot can show up to 25 meeting results, which can limit visibility in larger calendars. We’re expanding this limit so you can see more relevant meetings at once making it easier to find, review, and act on the full context you need.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title:
Microsoft Teams: AI-powered notes for in-person
meetings with Facilitator in Teams Rooms on Android
copilot.summary:
In addition to capturing real-time notes and meeting outcomes during scheduled or hybrid meetings, the Facilitator agent assists you with notes, decisions and actions for in-person meetings in Teams Rooms on Android. Simply invite Facilitator with one tap of the room console. Meeting notes appear on the front of room display or touch board, are available via meeting recap when shared, and deleted if no one selected. Rest assured no data remains in the room. Available with Teams Rooms Pro.
GA date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot improved long files navigation using document structure, enabling more accurate answers and clearer citations.
copilot.summary:
We’ve improved how Copilot reads long and complex files by making it more aware of document structure. When you ask a question, Copilot can now navigate to the most relevant parts of your document (for example, specific sections/pages) before answering—helping reduce missed details and improving confidence with clearer citations that are easier to trace back to the source.
GA date: June CY2027

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Proactive push notifications for the Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app
copilot.summary:
The Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app will proactively send push notifications for common productivity workflows like 'Your Day at a Glance' and 'Items waiting for you', which send users to the respective Copilot response when opened. This feature taps into your Copilot Memory and will be available for users with Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses and can also be accessed once opening the Microsoft 365 Copilot app.
GA date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint directly from the PowerPoint Web App
copilot.summary:
You can now create a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint just as you open the PowerPoint web app.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Export metrics from Agent Dashboard
copilot.summary:
Users can export de-identified, row-level agent metrics and attributes from the Agent Dashboard. Exported data provides detailed insights into agent usage and user-level agent interactions across the organization, with personal identifiers removed. 
#copilotcontrolsystem
GA date: September CY2026
Preview date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Power user insights in Copilot dashboard
copilot.summary:
Understand who is building a habit using Copilot with the new power user insights in Copilot dashboard
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint directly from the PowerPoint Home
copilot.summary:
You can now create a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint straight from the PowerPoint Home in file menu.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint directly from the PowerPoint Home
copilot.summary:
You can now create a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint straight from the PowerPoint Home in file menu.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Glint - Copilot assisted commenting in Glint survey taking
copilot.summary:
Viva Glint survey takers will be able to use a streamlined version of Microsoft Copilot in the Glint survey taking experience to help them rewrite their comments, helping survey takers feel more confident about the feedback they’re providing. By increasing perceived security through reducing identifiable writing patterns and minimizing the effort required to refine feedback, this experience can encourage greater participation, longer responses, and more candid comments, which can drive higher engagement and richer insights from surveys.
GA date: August CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Now smarter with visuals: Copilot Chat leverages embedded images for richer, more accurate answers.
copilot.summary:
Copilot has been enhanced to interpret and ground responses using images embedded in files such as Word documents (.docx), PowerPoint presentations (.pptx), and PDFs. This capability allows Copilot to extract insights from visual elements like charts, diagrams, and screenshots, ensuring that answers are not only text-based but also informed by graphical context. By combining textual and visual understanding, Copilot delivers more comprehensive and contextually accurate responses for complex queries
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Outlook: Copilot now provides concise summaries with Outlook search results
copilot.summary:
Get answers to queries quickly with Copilot's concise AI summaries at the top of Outlook search results. Users can dig deeper by opening Copilot chat directly from the Copilot summary card. 
GA date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: AI-powered notes for in-person meetings with Facilitator in Teams Rooms on Windows
copilot.summary:
In addition to capturing real-time notes and meeting outcomes during scheduled or hybrid meetings, the Facilitator agent assists you with notes, decisions and actions for in-person meetings in Teams Rooms on Windows. Simply invite Facilitator with one tap of the room console. Meeting notes appear on the front of room display or touch board, are available via meeting recap when shared, and deleted if no one selected. Rest assured no data remains in the room. Available with Teams Rooms Pro.
GA date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Edge: v.148 - Shadow AI
copilot.summary:
Currently admins can set Purview DLP policies to protect sensitive data from being sent to any Generative AI apps, users get blocked from sending their prompts to LLM when this is triggered and stops their workflow. This new add-on to the feature shows a new UI that will give users the option to be redirected to M365 Copilot which will open and navigate to this M365 Copilot tab and allow them to send the same prompt there.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Outlook: Account Selector in Outlook Copilot Side Pane
copilot.summary:
When users have more than one Copilot-enabled account added to new Outlook, the Copilot side pane in Calendar will include an account dropdown that makes it clear which Copilot-enabled account you’re using and lets you switch accounts without relying on Outlook UI’s account context.
GA date: May CY2026
Preview date: April CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention - Expand protection to Copilot + PC devices for Recall snapshots through custom policies
copilot.summary:
Microsoft Purview Endpoint data loss prevention is expanding coverage to Copilot + PCs initially to support Recall snapshots and determining whether policies exist to prevent capture of windows containing restricted sensitivity labels and Sensitive information types (SITs). Purview admins will author Endpoint DLP custom policies to integrate with Windows Copilot + PC Recall setup by Intune admins for Copilot + PC devices exclusively.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Outlook: Copilot in File Previewer for iOS
copilot.summary:
Access Copilot directly when previewing files in Outlook. Tap the Copilot button to get smart suggestions, summaries, and answers about your documents without leaving the previewer. Get quick help understanding attachments and files right when you need it.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Excel: Plan Mode for Copilot in Excel
copilot.summary:
Plan Mode for Copilot in Excel helps users make complex changes with confidence by outlining a clear, step by step approach before anything in the workbook is updated. Users can review how Copilot intends to complete the task, see which data or capabilities may be used, and adjust the plan as needed—ensuring edits are intentional, transparent, and aligned with their goals before they’re applied. This makes it easier to tackle multi step or high impact tasks while staying in control of every change.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Chat can now better match search results from Scanned PDFs and from text inside images embedded in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint
copilot.summary:
Copilot Chat can now better match search results from Scanned PDFs and from text that appears inside images embedded in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files — such as scanned contracts in Word, screenshots of tables in Excel, or whiteboard photos in PowerPoint — content that was previously difficult to search and find.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: PowerPoint: Create and Edit images with the model of your choice
copilot.summary:
You can now choose your preferred image model including OpenAI’s GPT Image, Black Forest Lab’s Flux and Microsoft’s MAI-Image and more, for smart, dynamic selection when creating or editing images with Copilot in PowerPoint, or when generating a new presentation or page.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: PowerPoint: Create and Edit images with the model of your choice
copilot.summary:
You can now choose your preferred image model including OpenAI’s GPT Image, Flux, or Auto for smart, dynamic selection when creating or editing images with Copilot in PowerPoint, or when generating a new presentation or page.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Find meetings based on topics and keywords
copilot.summary:
Copilot will be able to find meetings based on topics or keywords from relevant data like meeting body, chat and transcription.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: SharePoint: Create charts on pages with AI
copilot.summary:
This feature empowers authors to create rich, interactive charts with AI in SharePoint when editing SharePoint pages. Authors can describe the chart they want to create in plain language within a chat on a SharePoint page. 
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: AI-generated meeting archive for knowledge retention
copilot.summary:
Admins can enable a tenant-wide policy that allows Copilot (and Facilitator) to retain key insights from meetings beyond transcript retention periods. This enables Copilot to continue answering questions about past meetings even after transcripts expire. Admins can also configure how long this AI-generated meeting archive is stored.
GA date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Outlook: Copilot Search Suggestions for Outlook
copilot.summary:
Get Copilot suggestions in the Outlook search menu to help you stay on top of your inbox and calendar, find what you are looking for and get more done in Outlook.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: New Overview experience and agent categories in Agent Dashboard
copilot.summary:
Customers can now view and understand their agent landscape through the new Overview page that will be included as part of the Agent Dashboard in Microsoft Viva. This experience will provide customers with key at-a-glance insights on adoption in their organizations, visibility into who’s creating agents used in their organization, and details on what business process categories these agents are used for.
GA date: September CY2026
Preview date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Unlocking Deeper Copilot Insights with Enhanced Power BI Filtering
copilot.summary:
Enable Global and Insights admins to turn on additional attributes as filters in Power BI reports, including reserved attributes and your organization’s custom attributes. Users who have access to Power BI reports can then use these newly enabled filters to tailor reports to their business needs.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Sharing recap access
copilot.summary:
Recording and transcript owners can now grant recording and transcript access to specified people when copying or sharing recap link, and the specified people can access the recap without having to request access.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Facilitator detects and answers questions
copilot.summary:
Facilitator now automatically detects open questions raised during a Teams meeting and offers to help answer them using web search. When a participant asks a question (e.g., “What is an LLM?”) and no one answers, Facilitator posts a prompt offering to find an answer. Participants can select “Yes” to have the agent retrieve and share the information.
GA date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - DLP Policy Change Insights with Security Copilot
copilot.summary: Introduce an AI-powered capability leveraging Microsoft Security Copilot to automatically generate natural language explanations of changes made to DLP policies after each update within Microsoft Purview. This feature will analyze policy version deltas (pre-update vs. post-update) and produce a structured, human-readable summary that clearly explains: What changed Where the change occurred (rule, condition, action, location, etc.) The impact of the change The potential enforcement implications The goal is to eliminate manual policy diff analysis, reduce configuration ambiguity, and improve gov

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create Excel spreadsheets from Copilot Notebooks
copilot.summary:
Copilot Notebooks allows users to generate Excel spreadsheets using the content and references gathered in a notebook. Copilot drafts a structured spreadsheet grounded in the notebook’s context, which can be opened and edited in Excel, helping users move from ideas and source material to a ready‑to‑use spreadsheet with fewer manual steps.
GA date: May CY2026
Preview date: March CY2026

copilot.title: Outlook: Copilot provides coaching feedback in chat as you draft, edit and format emails
copilot.summary:
Copilot now provides coaching feedback on email drafts via chat and can apply suggestions directly to your message in Outlook. Users have the option to choose which suggestions are applied, and Copilot updates your email in place.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft 365: Companion apps - Copilot prompts in the Files app now available for Copilot Chat users
copilot.summary:
The Files companion app, part of the Microsoft 365 companion apps suite on the Windows taskbar, now surfaces AI-powered Copilot file prompts for Copilot Chat users. Previously available only to Microsoft 365 Copilot licensees, this update extends contextual file prompts to Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat users, enabling them to discover and interact with relevant files through intelligent suggestions. Users can find their most relevant files faster and take action on them directly from the Files app. 
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Critique in Researcher
copilot.summary:
Responses are generated by GPT and Claude working together, with GPT drafting an initial response and Claude reviewing for increased response accuracy, completeness, and citation integrity. 
GA date: July CY2026
Preview date: March CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Researcher Council
copilot.summary:
Council in Researcher runs multiple leading AI models from different providers in parallel in one place, so you can quickly compare outputs and see consensus vs. conflict) to make high-stakes decisions with greater confidence—without switching tools.
GA date: July CY2026
Preview date: March CY2026

copilot.title: PowerPoint: Create and Edit images with the model of your choice
copilot.summary:
You can now choose your preferred image model including OpenAI’s GPT Image, Flux, or Auto for smart, dynamic selection when creating or editing images with Copilot in PowerPoint, or when generating a new presentation or page.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics: "All"- licensed user page Copilot dashboard
copilot.summary:
The Copilot Dashboard adoption landing page will be updated to show a unified view of Copilot adoption across the organization. Instead of the default page showing only on Microsoft 365 Copilot (licensed) usage, the page will include all Copilot user adoption, covering both M365 Copilot and Copilot Chat usage that does not require a license. A License filter will allow users to switch between All, M365 Copilot (licensed), and Copilot Chat (unlicensed) views.
GA date: April CY2026
Preview date: March CY2026

copilot.title: OneDrive: Discover Copilot actions in File Preview
copilot.summary:
See what Copilot can do the moment you preview a file in OneDrive or SharePoint. Ready-to-use prompts appear alongside the Copilot button, helping you summarize documents, generate FAQs, and more — all without writing a single prompt.
GA date: April CY2026

copilot.title: Outlook: View, edit & share Copilot Pages with Outlook for Android
copilot.summary:
Users can now view, edit and share Copilot Pages with Outlook for Android, making it easier to continue working with Copilot and colleagues while on the go.
GA date: July CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Intelligent meeting recap available without saving transcript
copilot.summary:
Intelligent recap can now be generated without retaining a transcript after the meeting. Meeting organizers can choose this setting from the meeting options before the meeting, or organizers and eligible participants can enable it during the meeting. After the meeting, the AI Summary will be available, but other elements of the recap may not be available (Chapters, Topics, Mentions, Audio recap).
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Federated Copilot Connectors
copilot.summary: Microsoft is announcing the General Availability (GA) of federated Copilot connectors for Microsoft 365 Copilot. Federated Copilot connectors enable users to securely connect Copilot to popular third‑party sources and retrieve data in real time using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). These connectors do not store or index customer data in Microsoft services; access occurs in real time using the user’s identity, while administrators retain full governance and control through the Microsoft 365 admin center. With GA, federated Copilot connectors will be supported in Researcher agent, Microsoft 36

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Mind Maps in Copilot Notebooks
copilot.summary:
Mind Maps in Copilot Notebooks are interactive visual artifacts that help users understand notebook content through a grounded map of key topics, themes, and relationships. Users can explore the Mind Map, view summaries for individual nodes, and use Notebook chat to get more detail about a node. Available across OneNote and Microsoft 365 Copilot App.
GA date: May CY2026
Preview date: March CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Updated chat-first design in the Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app
copilot.summary:
We are introducing a refreshed chat-first design in the Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app, bringing a cleaner, more intuitive interface to users. This update includes a modernized design language, streamlined navigation, and other improvements that make it easier and faster for users to start, continue, and manage chats on the mobile app.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: OneNote: Multimodal capture in Copilot Notebooks (iPhone)
copilot.summary:
Multimodal capture enables users to transcribe audio, take images, and type notes in a single session. Copilot then creates a structured Copilot Page with insights and user-captured content, saved to a user-selected Copilot Notebook. Designed for capturing offline work moments—including in-person conversations, whiteboard sessions, and personal notes. Other endpoints coming soon.
GA date: May CY2026
Preview date: March CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create interactive visuals in Copilot Pages
copilot.summary:
Create an interactive report, visualization, or dashboard using Copilot Pages. Copilot uses web data and the latest LLM models and can also ground responses in your Work data.
GA date: April CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create PowerPoint presentations from Copilot Notebooks
copilot.summary:
Copilot Notebooks enables users to generate PowerPoint presentations directly from the content and references collected in a notebook. Using the notebook’s curated context, Copilot creates a structured, editable slide deck that users can open and refine in PowerPoint, helping turn research, notes, and insights into shareable presentations more quickly.
GA date: May CY2026
Preview date: March CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create Word documents from Copilot Notebooks
copilot.summary:
Copilot Notebooks allows users to generate Word documents using the content and references gathered in a notebook. Copilot drafts a structured document grounded in the notebook’s context, which can be opened and edited in Word, helping users move from ideas and source material to a ready‑to‑use document with fewer manual steps.
GA date: May CY2026
Preview date: March CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Intelligent Summaries in Copilot Dashboard
copilot.summary:
Use intelligent summaries in Copilot Dashboard to quickly surface what’s working and where targeted attention can accelerate Copilot adoption. Intelligent summaries highlight key adoption trends to focus on areas of success. Suggested prompts enable deeper exploration of underlying trends and drivers.
GA date: June CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Video recap in Teams
copilot.summary:
Intelligent meeting recap will now include video-based recaps. Video recap creates narrated video highlights from recorded meetings, featuring key takeaways and short clips that showcase important moments.
GA date: April CY2026

copilot.summary:
Find meetings—and everything connected to them, in seconds.

copilot.summary: A picture is worth a thousand words. Before, Microsoft 365 Copilot agent builders would need to use the default icon or manually upload their own image. Copilot Dashboard users can now visualize trends in additional key adoption and impact metrics over time to more quickly identify patterns and opportunities in employee adoption for better licensing decisions. Users will be able to now view Adoption metrics on either a monthly or weekly timeframe for specific groups of interest, as well as deep dive into Impact metrics like Copilot Assisted Hours, Actions Taken, and feature-specific dimensions. 
GA date: May CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Pulse - Authoring with M365 Copilot
copilot.summary:
Viva Pulse authors can now work with M365 Copilot to add a question, rewrite a question, and create a survey from scratch to quickly create and send their surveys to their teams to collect feedback. M365 Copilot can seamlessly capture the author's needs to recommend survey questions that fit their unique scenario. #copilotcontrolsystem
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): In Copilot Pages, the Chat can now be used to modify the Page
copilot.summary:
When a Chat and a Page are open side by side, prompts within the Chat can now be used to modify or add to the contents of the Page.
GA date: October CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot: Work from your recent prompts in Draft with Copilot
copilot.summary:
Based on what you're typing, Copilot in Word shows your most recent prompts, which you can use as-is or modify in Draft with Copilot.
GA date: August CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Copilot summary for transferred calls
copilot.summary:
When a call is forwarded/transferred to another colleague, users can prompt Copilot to automatically summarize the context, open questions, etc. for the call as a briefing for the receiving colleague. This feature ensures that the recipient is well-informed about the previous conversations related to the transferred call, enhancing their understanding and preparedness. 
GA date: June CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Support large documents in Word Copilot
copilot.summary:
Support customers referencing large documents
GA date: April CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Ability to Stop Copilot while it is generating a response
copilot.summary:
Copilot in Teams will now have a 'stop' button after sending a prompt. This will allow the user to stop Copilot's response either before the response has started to generate, or even after the response is generating. The user may then start a new prompt if they wish.
GA date: May CY2025

copilot.title: PowerPoint: Designer is now part of Copilot, enhanced with new template and slide Suggestions.
copilot.summary:
Designer is now part of Copilot. Copilot Suggestions now brings you familiar Designer slide layout and presentation template suggestions in a vertical gallery, along with new capabilities.
GA date: April CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Copilot only during call
copilot.summary:
Copilot is only available during the live call session and will not be accessible after the call ends. No recording or transcription is required to use Copilot during the call.

 
GA date: July CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Translated Intelligent meeting recap for multilingual meetings (Copilot and Teams Premium)
copilot.summary:
Now, intelligent meeting recap supports multilingual meetings, ensuring you can easily catch up on key discussions even when multiple languages were spoken. After the meeting, your recap is automatically generated in the translation language you selected for live transcription and captions.
GA date: April CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Meeting organizers can enable transcription in multilingual meetings (Copilot and Teams Premium)
copilot.summary:
We’re introducing a new organizer-level control that no longer requires all meetings to have one common spoken language to be set across all participants. Meeting organizers with Copilot or Teams Premium licenses will see a new control in meeting options called “Enable multilingual speech recognition.” When this is enabled before a meeting, each meeting participant will be able to set their own spoken language during the meeting, and the meeting transcript can accurately reflect each participant’s language of choice. 
GA date: April CY2025

copilot.title: Outlook: Schedule from email with Copilot
copilot.summary: Often you may want to transition a conversation from an email thread to a meeting. Copilot helps you do this by being able to start scheduling right from the email conversation. It saves you time and effort by generating a meeting invite that's ready for you to review and send. When you click on "Schedule with Copilot" a meeting form will appear with a Copilot generated meeting title, agenda, and conversation summary as well as a pre-filled attendee list from the email thread and an attachment of the original email thread. This feature will be available in the new Outlook for Windows, web, Mac

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Copilot in Teams meetings responses can be exported to Word and Excel
copilot.summary: Now, certain responses from Copilot in Teams meetings will have an option to ‘edit in’ Word or Excel. The ‘edit in’ option for Word will be available for Copilot responses that are long (more than 1300 characters) and will automatically open a Word document with the response written. The ‘edit in’ option for Excel will be available for Copilot responses that are formatted in a table, and will automatically open an Excel file with the formatted response added. Copilot responses can only be exported if the meeting policy for the meeting is set to allow copying or forwarding of meeting chat, live

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot uses Enterprise assets hosted on Templafy when creating presentations with Copilot

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Support for summarization of very long documents

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Support for summarization of very long documents

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Audio summary of your file

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Pulse - Pulse users can assign other users as delegates

Viva Pulse users can now assign other users as delegates to create and send pulses on their behalf.

GA date: October CY2025
Preview date: June CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): The chat experience now offers better search refinement on CIQ menu Files tab

GA date: October CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Chat now offers meeting series selection on CIQ Menu

GA date: September CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Rich artifacts in Copilot Pages
copilot.summary:
You can now create rich artifacts, including interactive charts, tables, complex diagrams, and code created with Copilot from enterprise or web data. Artifacts can be added to Pages to further edit and refine with Copilot. They are interactive and stay in sync across Microsoft 365 when shared for collaborative work.
GA date: April CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Enhanced Copilot in Engage
copilot.summary:
Copilot in Engage has now been integrated with M365,providing the same rich access to the M365 Graph, and helping you natively access Microsoft data in the flow of Engage.  Alongside this update, you can expect improved AI-powered writing assistance that bring in email/chat/files data to help craft both the content and style of your message
GA date: August CY2025

copilot.title: SharePoint: Chat one-on-one with SharePoint agents in Teams
copilot.summary:
Users can chat one-on-one with a SharePoint agent directly within Teams chat.
GA date: May CY2026

copilot.title: Outlook: Copilot Pages – View, edit & share in Outlook Mobile

Continue working with Copilot and colleagues while on the go, with the ability to view, edit and share Pages on mobile.

copilot.title: Outlook: Agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot available in Copilot Chat in classic Outlook for Windows

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create a PowerPoint slide from a file or prompt
copilot.summary:
Creating impactful slides can be challenging and time-consuming. Copilot helps you quickly turn your ideas and files into a fully designed slide with content ready to edit and refine, making the presentation creation and refinement process more personalized and efficient.
GA date: April CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Recap changes over more time
copilot.summary:
Recapping the changes you made in Loop is no longer limited to the current session. You can now recap changes that were made over a longer period of time.
GA date: March CY2025

copilot.title: SharePoint: SharePoint agents are available in Teams app Store
copilot.summary:
You can find and add SharePoint agents from the Teams app Store.

Preview date: August CY2025

SharePoint agents can be used in a Teams Channel similar to how they can be used in a Teams Group Chat.
GA date: September CY2025
Preview date: August CY2025

copilot.title: Add multiple SharePoint agents in a single Teams conversation
copilot.summary:
Users can include more than one SharePoint agent as a participant in a Teams group chat, meeting chat, or channel.

Preview date: September CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot uses Enterprise assets hosted on Templafy when creating presentations with Copilot
copilot.summary:
Once you connect your asset library hosted with Templafy to Microsoft365 and Copilot, you will be able to create presentations with your organization's images

copilot.title: SharePoint: SharePoint agents in Teams Mobile
copilot.summary:
Use SharePoint agents in Teams Mobile group chats and meetings.
GA date: September CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management - Risky AI usage
copilot.summary:
With this update, Insider Risk Management will help admins identify risky AI usage. We are adding new detections of intentional and unintentional insider risk activity on generative AI apps that can pose a risk to an organization. Activities will include risky prompts containing sensitive info or risky intent and sensitive responses containing sensitive info or is generated from sensitive files or sites.  Coverage will span across Microsoft Copilots and 3P generative AI apps. These detections will also contribute to Adaptive Protection insider risk levels.

Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Man

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Microsoft Purview capabilities for M365 Copilot
copilot.summary:
Microsoft Purview is launching several capabilities in government cloud environments that help secure and govern data in Microsoft 365 Copilot. These are capabilities in Information Protection, Data Lifecycle Management, Audit, eDiscovery, and Communication Compliance. These capabilities will be available once Microsoft 365 Copilot is deployed. #copilotcontrolsystem

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Learning - Copilot Academy reports in Viva Insights

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Pronoun Awareness in Microsoft 365 Copilot

Microsoft 365 Copilot will soon use pronouns from user profiles when responding, creating a more personalized interaction for users.

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Suggestions for slide templates as you work

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Facilitator Agent
copilot.summary: The Facilitator agent works alongside you and your team to help you manage your meetings effortlessly. Throughout the meeting, Facilitator takes notes that everyone can co-author, manages the time and agenda, and can quickly surface relevant information from the web or the conversation itself. Users can now use the Facilitator agent in Teams Rooms on Windows for real-time notes and action items during both scheduled hybrid and impromptu in-person meetings using AI. In hybrid meetings, the agent appears in the notes panel. For in-person meetings, a participant can scan the QR code on the displa

Once you connect your asset library, hosted with Templafy, to Microsoft 365 and Copilot, you will be able to create presentations with your organization's images.

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot extensibility – Embedded Knowledge capability support for declarative agents.

Developers and makers can embed knowledge (pdf, doc/docx, ppt) into their declarative agents built with Teams Toolkit for additional grounding capabilities.

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot extensibility – Ability to use the Graph connector selector when using Teams Toolkit

Developers using Teams Toolkit to author declarative agents can select specific Graph connectors to improve their knowledge grounding.

This new capability will enable admins to scan existing files at rest in SharePoint or OneDrive for Business for sensitive data and classify and/or label them accordingly. This includes files that have never been scanned or scanned in some time. #copilotcontrolsystem

Preview date: March CY2025

copilot.title: Outlook: Summarize email attachments with Copilot

You will now be able to summarize PDF, Word, and PowerPoint email attachments with Copilot in Outlook. The new feature will be available for Outlook Web, the new Outlook for Windows, Outlook Mobile, and the new Outlook for Mac. #newoutlookforwindows

copilot.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Department graph for Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI
copilot.summary:
A new graph added to Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI displays the departments of users interacting with M365 Copilot. #copilotcontrolsystem

Preview date: June CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot extensibility – Developers can use Kiota as an API plugin generation tool

Developers using Teams Toolkit and Kiota can use them together as an API plugin generation tool. This unlocks new scenarios like searching our repository of public APIs, visually selecting the main integration endpoints and improving the maintainability of existing plugins by using a workspace file and allowing full regeneration of plugin files.
GA date: March CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Extensibility -  Automatic project scaffolding in Teams Toolkit for building Graph connectors
copilot.summary:
Developers can now leverage an automatic project scaffolding for Graph connector applications within the Teams Toolkit, allowing for the generation of a full production-ready Graph connector application from just an API description file, significantly reducing setup time and complexity. 
GA date: May CY2025

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot extensibility – Developers can build custom engine agents with the Microsoft 365 Agents SDK

Developers can use the Microsoft 365 Agents SDK to create custom engine agents. These agents, built on their own AI stack, can be deployed to various platforms, including Microsoft 365 Copilot, Microsoft Teams, and other non-Microsoft channels.

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot extensibility – Copilot Chat developer mode

copilot.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Studio agents report in Viva Insights analyst workbench
copilot.summary:
Custom agent adoption metrics and insights report in Viva Insights analyst workbench. Scope includes custom agents created in Copilot Studio, insights are aggregated on the agent-level. 
GA date: July CY2025
Preview date: June CY2025

copilot.title: Data Loss Prevention- DLP Policy Change Insights with Security Copilot
copilot.summary:
Copilot for Security in DLP can summarize DLP policies. This enhancement enables DLP admins to gain insights on coverage of policies viz. location, classifiers and notifications, and more. 
 
DLP admins can get these insights on all the policies or on few selected policies. They will be able to use prompts to gain deeper level view of how a policy is configured for their digital landscape. This helps them align their data posture on a regular basis and make corrections to policy posture as needed. #copilotcontrolsystem
GA date: September CY2026

copilot.title: Word: Chat with Copilot about selected text
copilot.summary:
Start a chat with Copilot while text in your document is selected, and Copilot's response will be scoped to what you have selected.
GA date: January CY2025

copilot.summary:

copilot.summary:

Find yourself referencing the same files using Copilot in OneDrive? This feature requires a Microsoft Copilot for Microsoft 365 license and will be available to customers on OneDrive Web.

Preview date: September CY2025

copilot.title: OneNote: Copilot Notebooks inside OneNote
copilot.summary:
Users can now access Copilot Notebooks inside OneNote. Using Copilot Notebooks, users can pull together and reason over a wide range of content such as notes, documents, websites, meeting recordings, and more.

copilot.title: Microsoft Teams: Copilot in Teams can analyze content shared on-screen during a meeting
copilot.summary: Copilot in Teams can analyze content shared on-screen during a meeting when recording is enabled. This, along with meeting transcript and meeting chat, enables users to ask Copilot to summarize or find specific information from screen-shared content (e.g., ‘Which products had the highest sales?’), consolidate insights across both the conversation and presentation (e.g., 'What was the feedback per slide?'), and draft new content based on the entire meeting (e.g., 'Rewrite the paragraph shared on the screen incorporating the feedback from the chat’). This works for any content shared while shari

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): BizChat - Edge contextual capabilities in Business Chat work mode
copilot.summary:

GA date: March CY2025

copilot.title: OneDrive: Convert Copilot response into a Word file

Like a summary or FAQ that Copilot generated for you? Now, with one click, you can convert any Copilot response into a Word document. This feature requires a Microsoft Copilot for Microsoft 365 license and will be available to commercial customers on OneDrive Web.

copilot.title: OneDrive: Create a presentation from a Word file

Preview date: May CY2024

copilot.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Summarize files shared in Teams chat with Copilot

It will work on common file types like Word and PDF to start with and other formats will be added over due course. This requires a Microsoft Copilot for Microsoft 365 license.

Once Rewrite is available, users signed in with a Microsoft Entra ID will have enterprise data protection when using the feature in Microsoft Edge. Updated March 20, 2026: We have paused release of this feature temporarily and will announce new release timelines soon. We apologize for any inconvenience. 
More info: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/copilot/edge

This feature uses a data-driven approach to suggest users who are in the best position to gain the most value from Microsoft 365 Copilot and efficiently assign licenses to these users.

This helps admin to identify and administer same/similar settings and policies to similar sites all using the power of AI.
